race.description: 7 Your Home Of Horse Racing Starmaker Handicap
race.comment: BETTER OFF ALONE (4) was very green when resuming in the G3 Ottawa Stakes at Flemington and dropped out quickly once they sprinted, but she has since gone big at the trials and looks ready to show her true ability. Expect her to find the front and prove too sharp for them. HELLENIC BELLE (5) was in the market on debut when thrown straight into the G3 Magic Night at Rosehill, but she raced keenly and couldn't keep up. This is a far more suitable assignment and sharp improvement is anticipated. STREET LYRIC (8) is a Street Boss filly on debut for the Doyle yard and has tightened up nicely through two neat trials. She draws well for Morgan and is entitled to consideration. MAZORT (1) and RAGUEL (2) are other debutants worth a market watch. Both have shown enough in their trials to suggest they can fill a minor spot.
